creator: Churchill Films
description: A brief survey of human reproduction, particularly the sequence of development of the embryo and possibilities of damage Search Educational Film Journals at Media History Project for references to this film Summary Follows the development of a baby from the time of conception to birth. Emphasizes that the mother should care for herself well to insure a healthy baby.
subject: 16mm Film

title: Have a healthy baby
